001package tools.PathplannerFlip;
002
003import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode;
004import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper;
005import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ArrayNode;
006import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode;
007
008import java.io.File;
009import java.io.IOException;
010
011public class PathplannerFlip {
012    private static final double FIELD_HEIGHT = 8.0;
013    private static final String PATH_DIR = "./src/main/deploy/pathplanner/paths/";
014
015    public static void main(String[] args) throws IOException {
016        if (args.length <= 0) {
017            System.err.println("Missing path argument.");
018            return;
019        }
020
021        final String pathName = args[0];
022        final ObjectMapper mapper = new ObjectMapper();
023
024        final File inputFile = new File(PATH_DIR + pathName + ".path");
025        final ObjectNode root = (ObjectNode) mapper.readTree(inputFile);
026
027        JsonNode waypoints = root.get("waypoints");
028        if (waypoints != null) {
029            for (JsonNode waypoint : waypoints) {
030                flipWaypoint((ObjectNode) waypoint, "anchor");
031                flipWaypoint((ObjectNode) waypoint, "prevControl");
032                flipWaypoint((ObjectNode) waypoint, "nextControl");
033            }
034        }
035
036        JsonNode pointTowardsZones = root.get("pointTowardsZones");
037        if (pointTowardsZones != null) {
038            for (JsonNode zone : pointTowardsZones) {
039                flipWaypoint((ObjectNode) zone, "fieldPosition");
040            }
041        }
042
043        mapper.writerWithDefaultPrettyPrinter().writeValue(new File(PATH_DIR + pathName + " Flipped.path"), root);
044        System.out.println("Saved to " + pathName + " Flipped.path");
045    }
046
047    private static void flipWaypoint(ObjectNode parent, String fieldName) {
048        JsonNode node = parent.get(fieldName);
049        if (node == null || node.isNull())
050            return;
051
052        ObjectNode point = (ObjectNode) node;
053        double flippedY = FIELD_HEIGHT - point.get("y").asDouble();
054        point.put("y", flippedY);
055    }
056}
